mapper.select: SELECT id, file_key AS "fileKey", original_name AS "originalName", cdn_url AS "cdnUrl", mime_type AS "mimeType", file_size_bytes AS "fileSizeBytes", width, height, alt_text AS "altText", folder, created_time AS "createdAt" FROM cms_media AND folder = #{folder}AND mime_type = #{mimeType}AND LOWER(original_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%',#{originalName},'%')) ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cms_media AND folder = #{folder}AND mime_type = #{mimeType}
